author: LapushBaby
name: Stock train_gpt baseline — 1×GPU RunPod, 600s wallclock
blurb: Non-record: unmodified root train_gpt.py, FineWeb sp1024 (10 train shards), single-GPU RunPod pod, MAX_WALLCLOCK_SECONDS=600. Post int8+zlib roundtrip val_bpb ~1.363 under 16MB artifact cap. Documented for reproducibility; not competitive with 8×H100 SOTA.
gpu: 1×GPU (RunPod, exact SKU not pinned in log)
